    General

    Start on login
    Launch Carmine when you sign in

    File Associations

      Advanced

      Cache directory
      Where downloaded files are stored
      Cache size limit
      Maximum disk space for cached files
      Metadata TTL
      Seconds before re-fetching folder listings
      Log level
      Verbosity of diagnostic output

          Auto-removal
          How long pinned folders stay available offline
